text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through the central plaza when I spot
Agnes Digital observing King Halo from the
shadows.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhh, King... I'm so worried... So very, very
worried...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Eek! How long have you been standing there?! I-I
haven't done anything, okay?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What a racket... What is happening over here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, no, no! She's found me too! It's over, it's
so over!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? It's you... I've seen you out of the corner of
my eye several times since morning. Do you have
business with me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I, um, uhh... N-n-nope! No business here!
choice_data_list: Didn't you just say you were worried about her?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Worried? About me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Guh! It's come to this, I have no choice but to
come clean and spill my guts!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, what worries me is that your day has
been so different from usual!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You've been diligently training every day for your
important scrimmage today, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I have, yes. I'm surprised you know.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And yet, your entourage is away on a trip—today
of all days!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, that's also correct...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, this means you didn't receive your
customary morning King Commendation, so your
whole day is now in disarray!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why do you know so much about me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Needless to say, I'm worried you might not be in
top form!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You might be right. I do feel thrown off-kilter
having my routine disrupted.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
To remedy that, I bestow upon you the honor of
commending me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That knowledge of yours proves to me that you're
a true fan, so I can think of no one better!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're giving me official permission to
commend you?! I can't believe I've been blessed
with such an honor!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your wish is my command! I shall gladly take on
this mantle and cheer for you with all my might!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I assume you're familiar with my
call-and-response chant, but let's see just how
well you know it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What's my name?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What am I?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A winner!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: How's my future?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Bright and beloved!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right! For I am the one and only—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: King Halo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Stupendous! I can't believe how perfect your
responses were.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I am now brimming with power!
Keep your eyes on me! I'll be the one to emerge
victorious today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, King! Look at how the light frames her! She's
a literal angel!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo claims a flawless victory, bathing in
Agnes Digital's fervent cheers throughout the
race.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm? Where's Digital?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to thank her, but where has she
gone?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After watching King Halo fly past the finish line,
Agnes Digital left her spot quietly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It was an honor to aid you in your victory, King...
There is no need for you to thank me personally!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It'll be more than enough for me to hear the King
Commendation again starting tomorrow!
